message:
feat(io): add MissingIndexColumn error variant and CSV edge-case tests

Improves error reporting and test coverage in the fp-io CSV reader:

- Add dedicated MissingIndexColumn error variant to IoError enum, replacing
  the misleading reuse of JsonFormat for CSV index column lookup failures.
  This gives callers a precise, matchable error type when the specified
  index_col name doesn't exist in the CSV headers.
- Add test: csv_with_missing_index_col_errors — verifies that specifying a
  nonexistent index column produces MissingIndexColumn, not a generic error
- Add test: csv_with_malformed_row_errors — verifies that ragged CSV rows
  (fewer columns than headers) produce a proper Csv parser error
- Import IoError in test module to enable direct pattern matching on error
  variants

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
